{ "name": "dlv", "version": "1.1.3", "description": "Safely get a dot-notated property within an object.", "main": "dist/dlv.js", "browser": "dist/dlv.umd.js", "module": "dist/dlv.es.js", "scripts": { "dev": "microbundle watch", "build": "microbundle", "prepublish": "npm run build", "test": "node test", "release": "npm run build && npm test && git commit -am $npm_package_version && git tag $npm_package_version && git push && git push --tags && npm publish" }, "keywords": [ "delve", "dot notation", "dot" ], "files": [ "index.js", "dist" ], "author": "Jason Miller <jason@developit.ca> (http://jasonformat.com)", "repository": "developit/dlv", "license": "MIT", "devDependencies": { "microbundle": "^0.11.0" } }
